job_title: Associate Value Engineer (AI-Driven Data Science & Analytics) - Orbit Program
strengths: Strong SQL and data engineering skills
Experience with Power BI and Tableau
Python automation and ETL pipeline development
Proven quantified impact (efficiency and revenue gains)
weaknesses: Limited explicit ML/LLM or modeling experience
No cited Proof of Concept projects for enterprise software
No SAP/Oracle or supply chain process examples
Relatively early-career (1-3 years) but limited direct enterprise client engagements
improvement_bullets: Developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%, showcasing experience with data visualization tools for process improvement.

Created statistical models to identify high-value customer segments; targeted marketing initiatives informed by these models contributed to a 300% increase in revenue in the targeted segment over 12 months, demonstrating an understanding of customer segmentation and ROI.

Built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports (ingesting POS and CRM data), saving 8 hours per week and improving reporting accuracy, highlighting experience with ETL pipelines and automation.

Designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns to measure audience response and lift, providing the statistical evidence needed to optimize marketing spend and demonstrating experience with proof-of-concept testing.

Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment, resulting in a consistent "single source of truth" and a reduction in report discrepancies, demonstrating data governance best practices.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Associate Value Engineer (AI-Driven Data Science & Analytics) - Orbit Program opportunity with Celonis. I am interested in this opportunity because Celonis' position as the global leader in Process Intelligence and its commitment to leveraging AI to unlock global productivity and sustainability deeply resonates with my passion for data-driven transformation.

What interests me about working for Celonis is its innovative approach to Process Mining and its transformative potential for businesses. This excites and inspires me because I believe in the power of understanding and optimizing processes to drive tangible value, a core tenet of Celonis' mission. I believe my strong analytical skills and my experience in translating complex data into actionable insights would make me a strong candidate for this role.

During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on data-driven problem-solving and quantifiable impact. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed statistical models to identify high-value customer segments, which directly contributed to a 300% increase in revenue for the targeted segment. This demonstrated my ability to leverage data for significant business growth. Ultimately, I know that the Associate Value Engineer role at Celonis would allow me to bring my expertise in data analysis and stakeholder communication to developing compelling Celonis-powered solutions that address critical business challenges.

Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters Cleaning Services enabled me to develop my skills in data visualization and stakeholder engagement. I standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, leading to a consistent "single source of truth" for all business stakeholders and a reduction in report discrepancies. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my passion for technology and its transformative potential in working on customer engagements and developing impactful presentations and demos at Celonis.

I know that my technical proficiency in SQL, Python, Power BI, and Tableau, combined with my customer-centric mindset and ability to articulate business value, align with what it takes to succeed in the Associate Value Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
